LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO DISMISS PLAINTIFFS' CEQA CAUSE OF ACTION PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA PUBLIC RESOURCES CODE SECTION 21167.4. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DENIED. PETITIONERS PRESENTED A REQUEST FOR A HEARING TO THE COURT CLERK ON 2/5/10, THE SAME DAY THEY FILED THEIR CEQA PETITION. THE REQUEST FULLY COMPLIED WITH PUBLIC RESOURCES CODE SECTION 21167.4 AND THE CLERK ERRED IN REFUSING TO ACCEPT THE PETITION AND FILE IT. PETITIONERS' REQUEST FOR A HEARING IS DEEMED FILED ON 2/5/10 IN COMPLIANCE WITH THE CODE. IT IS THE LEGISLATIVE AND JUDICIAL POLICY OF THIS STATE TO PREFER DISPOSITION OF LITIGATION ON THE MERITS RATHER THAN ON PROCEDURAL GROUNDS. (SEE CARLSON V. DEPT. OF FISH & GAME (1998) 68 CAL.APP. 4TH 1268.) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Re Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Plaintiffs' Ceqa Cause Of Action Pursuant To California Public Resources Code Section 211677.4
Off Calendar Oct-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND REAL PARTIES IN INTEREST T-MOBILE WEST CORP., T-MOBILE USA, INC., T-MOBILE RESOURCES CORP., AND OMNIPOINT COMMUNICATIONS, INC. RE-NOTICE OF MOTION TO DISMISS PLAINTIFFS' CEQA CAUSE OF ACTION PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA PUBLIC RESOURCES CODE SECTION 21167.4.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. PETITIONERS PRESENTED A REQUEST FOR A HEARING TO THE COURT CLERK ON 2/5/10, THE SAME DAY THEY FILED THEIR CEQA PETITION. THE REQUEST FULLY COMPLIED WITH PUBLIC RESOURCES CODE SECTION 21167.4 AND THE CLERK ERRED IN REFUSING TO ACCEPT THE PETITION AND FILE IT. PETITIONERS REQUEST FOR A HEARING IS DEEMED FILED ON 2/5/10 IN COMPLIANCE WITH THE CODE. IT IS THE LEGISLATIVE AND JUDICIAL POLICY OF THIS STATE TO PREFER DISPOSITION OF LITIGATION ON THE MERITS RATHER THAN ON PROCEDURAL GROUNDS. (SEE CARLSON V. DEPT. OF FISH & GAME (1998) 68 CAL.APP. 4TH 1268.) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
